LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANTS TREE OF LIFE, LLC, KEHE DISTRIBUTORS, LLC AND KEHE ENTERPRISES, LLC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. THE ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE ORDER FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM. =(302/HEK)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment; And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Erika McCartney's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendants Tree of Life, LLC, KeHE Distributors, LLC and KeHE Enterprises, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. The order and judgment are signed in open court. (see order for full details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
